class.name: BlaziumGoapGoal
class.brief_description: A goal that an agent attempts to satisfy using a sequence of actions.
class.description:
[BlaziumGoapGoal] defines a desired state that an AI agent wants to reach. When evaluated, the action planner attempts to find a path of [BlaziumGoapAction] sequences whose combined effects fulfill this goal's [member desired_state]. The agent automatically prioritizes the goal with the highest [member priority]. Example usage: [codeblock] class_name GoalSurvive extends BlaziumGoapGoal
var achieved := false
func _init(): set_name("SurviveGoal") priority = 10 desired_state = {"has_campfire": true}
func _on_goal_achieved(): achieved = true [/codeblock]

method.name: _enter
method.description: Called natively right before the agent actively begins following the plan for this goal.

method.name: _exit
method.description: Called natively right after the agent stops following the plan for this goal.

method.name: _get_cost
method.description: Calculates dynamic cost evaluations. Used natively if the goal incorporates variable state weights.

method.name: _get_priority
method.description: Called conditionally when the Agent sorts goals. Returning a dynamic number here allows the goal to spike in priority dynamically based on health or real-time world events.

method.name: _is_valid
method.description: Evaluated continuously while the goal is active or queued. Natively aborts the plan entirely if this suddenly returns false.

method.name: _on_goal_achieved
method.description: Invoked securely exactly when all sequence actions finish cleanly natively matching the desired state organically.

method.name: _on_goal_failed
method.description: Invoked securely when the A* planner cannot resolve a path, or an action breaks midway invalidating the sequence.

method.name: _perform
method.description: A tick function executing recursively inside the active Godot process frame while this specific goal manages the active plan natively.

method.name: _prepare
method.description: Calculates variables linearly right before resolving dynamic traits in the agent loop natively.

method.name: enter
method.description: C++ wrapper triggering [method _enter].

method.name: exit
method.description: C++ wrapper triggering [method _exit].

method.name: get_action_name
method.description: Returns the object's configured node name natively.

method.name: get_agent
method.description: Returns the [BlaziumGoapAgent] natively resolving this Goal.

method.name: get_cost
method.description: Evaluates the cost dynamically through [method _get_cost] and base [member cost].

method.name: get_priority
method.description: Calculates final execution priority natively mapping [method _get_priority].

method.name: init
method.description: Links references directly with the parent orchestration Agent.

method.name: is_performing
method.description: Returns true if this Goal currently holds control asynchronously.

method.name: is_valid
method.description: Internal validity checker wrapping [method _is_valid].

method.name: on_goal_achieved
method.description: C++ callback directly invoking [method _on_goal_achieved].

method.name: on_goal_failed
method.description: C++ callback directly invoking [method _on_goal_failed].

method.name: perform
method.description: C++ frame loop invoking [method _perform].

method.name: prepare
method.description: Internal setup resolving [method _prepare].

members.member: A static cost modifier utilized by the A* calculation metric pathing.
Determines baseline validity for tracking natively if no GDScript override acts upon the goal.
The explicit dictionary requirements necessary to satisfy this goal natively through the action loop planner.
Flags whether the goal can natively be selected by the agent for processing.
The raw priority used when calculating which goal assumes control. Higher priority takes precedent.
